mnemonics: Mnemonic: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE - A Robot That Is Fully Capable In All Learning tasks
Mnemonic: MACHINE LEARNING - Machines Learn And Compute Heuristically In Numerous Environments
keyPoints: Definition: AI refers to systems that mimic human intelligence
Core Concepts: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Neural Networks
Applications: Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Robotics
Types: Narrow AI vs General AI vs Superintelligent AI
Algorithms: Supervised, Unsupervised, and Reinforcement Learning
commonMistakes: Thinking all AI is conscious/sentient (most is narrow AI)
Overestimating current AI capabilities vs human intelligence
Underestimating data requirements for machine learning
Assuming AI models are always objective (can contain bias)
